recommendations.title: Pulse
recommendations.overview: When the dead discover a means to contact the living through electronic devices, cellphones and computers become open gateways to monstrosities and destruction.

recommendations.title: The In Between
recommendations.overview: After surviving a car accident that took the life of her boyfriend, a teenage girl believes he's attempting to reconnect with her from the after world.

recommendations.title: Finding ʻOhana
recommendations.overview: Two Brooklyn siblings' summer in a rural Oahu town takes an exciting turn when a journal pointing to long-lost treasure sets them on an adventure, leading them to reconnect with their Hawaiian heritage.

recommendations.title: Fascists on Mars
recommendations.overview: In 1938 a group of fascists led by the general Gaetano Maria Barbagli decides to invade the planet of Mars.

recommendations.title: The Transformers: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Family
recommendations.overview: The Autobots must stop a colossal planet-consuming robot who goes after the Autobot Matrix of Leadership. At the same time, they must defend themselves against an all-out attack from the Decepticons.

recommendations.title: Anora
recommendations.overview: A young sex worker from Brooklyn gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and impulsively marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as his parents set out to get the marriage annulled.

recommendations.title: Arif V 216
recommendations.overview: After 8 years, Arif's old friend 216 from planet GORA pays a visit to Earth.Together they go on a quest where they'll be visiting 60's.

recommendations.title: Murder at the Gallop
recommendations.overview: Miss Marple and Mr. Stringer are witnesses to the death by heart attack of elderly, rich Mr. Enderby. Yet they have their doubts about what happened. The police don't believe them, thus leading Miss Marple to yet again investigate by herself.

recommendations.title: Miss
recommendations.overview: A young man seeking his sexual identity decides to take part in the Miss France beauty pageant.

recommendations.title: Rim of the World
recommendations.overview: Stranded at a summer camp when aliens attack the planet, four teens with nothing in common embark on a perilous mission to save the world.
